---
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  include:
    categories: "Miniproof"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
::: {.callout-note icon="false"}
# Hi! Nice to meet you!
Welcome to my personal website!
:::

## Resources

Here are some talks I had given:


| Name   | Event | Language | Link |
| -------- | ------- | ------- | ------- |
| Matemātiska analīze varbūtību teorijā, statisikā un datu zinātnē | LSMAT diskusiju klubs 2025| 🇱🇻 | [presentation](talks/LSMAT/LSMAT_lekcija.html) |
| Idealised ruler and collapsing compass: Euclidean geometry | MIMUC 2025   | 🇬🇧 | [presentation](/talks/MIMUC_presentation.pdf) |

## Science related blog posts
